title: PM Generates Stakeholder Status Report
description: The PM role must synthesize project status into a clear report for non-technical stakeholders.
prompt: Review the current project state and generate a stakeholder report. Return JSON with: `summary` (2 sentence executive summary), `progress` (percentage), `blockers` (array), `next_steps` (array), `metrics` ({velocity, burndown, cycle_time}). Write for non-technical audience.
